NOTICE OF AND MOTION FOR ORDER QUASHING SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND VACATING DEFAULT- VOID JUDGMENT FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION OR SUPRISE, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT GABRIEL, BERT HEARING SET FOR MAR-27-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT BERT GABRIEL'S MOTION FOR ORDER QUASHING SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND VACATING DEFAULT/VOID JUDGMENT FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION OR SURPRISE IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. (301/PJB) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: DESAI, VIJAY S SUBSTITUTED FOR LAVINSKY, IVAN S AS ATTORNEY FOR CAPITAL FINANCIAL CREDIT, LLC

calendar.matters:
Notice Of And Motion For Order Quashing Service Of Summons And Vacating Default- Void Judgment For Lack Of Personal Jurisdiction Or Suprise
Off Calendar Mar-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT BERT GABRIEL'S MOTION FOR ORDER QUASHING SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND VACATING DEFAULT/VOID JUDGMENT FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION OR SURPRISE is granted, no opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189
